query:
UPDATE raw.source_material_registry
        SET status = $1,
            metadata = core.jsonb_merge_deep(metadata, jsonb_build_object(
                'recovery_info', jsonb_build_object(
                    'recovered_at', NOW(),
                    'recovery_reason', 'node_crash',
                    'original_status', 'sensing'
                )
            ))
        WHERE id = $2::uuid
